topics.description: Investors express annoyance with CMG's stock price, noting repeated rejections at $40. The dominant feeling shifted from annoyance to love week-over-week, despite a volume decrease.

$CMG Operating margin fell to 12.9% from 16.7% a year earlier, adjusted restaurant-level operating margin declined to 23.7% from 26.2%, and adjusted diluted earnings per share dropped 17.2% to 24 cents.

$CMG dips 5.9% post-earnings — is the fiesta over? 🌯 Despite beating EPS and revenue estimates, comparable sales fell 2.5%, and management warns of margin pressure from rising costs. Full scoop here 👉

$CMG earnings just dropped. Watching the print closely, traffic numbers are what matter here, not just the headline beat. Margins under pressure with food costs sticky. If comps miss, this thing gets repriced fast. $SHAK setup looks interesting on any spillover.

topics.label: Chipotle Earnings and Expansion

topics.label: CMG Expansion and Growth Strategy
topics.description: Investors are discussing Chipotle's (CMG) aggressive expansion plans, including 350 new units and Chipotlanes, to drive sales growth. The dominant sentiment is curiosity about whether this strategy will be successful.
